# UC-13.4.13 · Sequence-to-Sequence Log Anomaly Detection via Reconstruction Error using Splunk DSDL Autoencoders, Per-Cluster Drift Profiling, and Operational Tuning Loops

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Expert &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Performance, Capacity &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch your application diary lines for moments when the pattern they usually follow suddenly breaks. We bunch lonely odd lines differently from a real burst on one machine, and we ease urgent pages when rare words flood in so teams chase true trouble instead of harmless novelty.*

---

## Description

Detects Splunk Deep Learning Toolkit sequence-to-sequence autoencoder surprises on log lines by fusing materialized reconstruction_error summaries per template_id and sourcetype, five-minute host burst density, gradual versus abrupt drift_ratio cues, out-of-vocabulary token pressure, container inference_latency_ms and gpu_used, model inventory thresholds, template criticality lookups, Performance host enrichment, and ITSI or Enterprise Security notable correlation rows for analyst-feedback-aware routing.

## Value

Platform and security leaders receive an explainable narrative that separates harmless novelty from coordinated bursts, distinguishes slow model drift from sharp attack-like spikes, highlights blind sourcetypes missing encoder coverage, and ties heavy MLSPL container time to capacity decisions before silent scoring gaps or noisy pages erode trust in AI-assisted log review.

## Implementation

Land scored Seq2Seq autoencoder outputs into index=summary with source dsdl_seq2seq_inference, export DSDL container telemetry to index=otel_metrics sourcetype dsdl:container_metrics, mirror ITSI correlation to index=itsi_tracked_alerts source dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly, maintain dsdl_model_inventory.csv and log_template_inventory.csv, schedule platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly every fifteen minutes with earliest=-4h@h, route page and high severities to platform and ML on-call, archive weekly evidence with analyst feedback exports and coverage dashboards.

## Evidence

Saved search platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly on a fifteen-minute schedule; dashboard drilldowns across summary inference, container metrics, template and model lookups, Performance enrichment, and ITSI correlation; alert routing to platform ML on-call; weekly CSV exports archived to a restricted model operations index.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

In a lab tenant, ingest summary rows with reconstruction_error above accepted_error_threshold, cluster_density_5m at or above four on one host, and otel_metrics showing normal GPU while itsi_tracked_alerts source dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly mirrors the tuple, confirm platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly returns page or high with non-null recommended_action within thirty minutes.

### Negative scenario

After analysts mark analyst_feedback_label benign for the template family and reconstruction_error falls below rolling thresholds with singleton density only, confirm severities return to info and the alert wrapper emits zero rows when filtering to page and high across six consecutive runs.

## Detailed Implementation

### Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control jointly with observability engineering, the data science platform team operating Splunk App for Data Science and Deep Learning containers, search and indexer administrators who govern summary indexes and HTTP Event Collector landing zones, and security operations leaders who consume correlated notables. This use case is deliberately not UC-13.4.1 managed large-language-model HTTP latency fusion, not UC-13.4.2 token economics, not UC-13.4.3 accelerator duty-cycle telemetry, not UC-13.4.4 through UC-13.4.7 AI gateway and agent abuse analytics, and not UC-13.4.15 generic Machine Learning Toolkit population-stability and champion accuracy drift governance. Here the signal is sequence-to-sequence autoencoder reconstruction error on log lines and short token windows: the model learns to encode and decode normal templates, and per-line mean squared error between the embedded representation and its reconstruction flags unfamiliar structure. Operational axes include per-source and per-sourcetype baselines using rolling high percentiles from a clean training corpus, per-host burst density inside five minutes to suppress singleton noise, gradual baseline creep versus abrupt spike discrimination for model drift compared to genuine incidents, Drain3-style template identifiers for family-level error concentration, analyst-labeled false positives folded into the next training cohort, coverage of which sourcetypes actually reach the encoder versus silent blind spots, inference and container execution latency because MLSPL and Kubernetes scoring paths are heavy, cross-environment reconstruction distributions for production versus staging, out-of-vocabulary token rate trends that predict brittle reconstructions, and optional IT Service Intelligence or Enterprise Security notables for high-confidence tuples.

Licensing and platform posture: Deep Learning Toolkit depends on Machine Learning Toolkit fit and apply patterns, Python for Scientific Computing, container runtime access on search heads or dedicated model nodes, and network egress to registries you approve. RBAC must isolate training searches from interactive analysts where regulations require segregation. Evidence indexes may contain sensitive log text; hash or tokenize customer identifiers at ingest when legal mandates minimization. GPU workers need thermal and power governance independent of this detection narrative.

Risk briefing: reconstruction error is not causality; high error means the model is surprised, which includes novel benign releases, quarterly batch jobs, migration formats, and intentional debug logging. Combine density, drift shape, vocabulary metrics, and human feedback before executive escalation. Silent summary index gaps can look like low anomaly rates while attacks proceed in unscored sourcetypes; run coverage checks weekly.

Differentiation recap: DSDL sequence-to-sequence autoencoder log anomaly detection via reconstruction error, container latency, template families, and analyst feedback loops, not provider LLM SLO analytics, not MLTK PSI-only drift cards in isolation.

### Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up five multisearch lanes plus two governance lookups so thresholds and template criticality never live only inside informal spreadsheets.

Lane one, application reference logs: land structured JSON application events in index=app with sourcetype=app:json including host, sourcetype, message fields, and optional precomputed template_id from your Drain3 or equivalent miner. This lane contextualizes volume and proves which hosts emit lines even when inference lags.

Lane two, materialized inference summaries: schedule a post-processing writer after MLSPL apply steps finish so each scored line or micro-batch emits to index=summary with source=dsdl_seq2seq_inference carrying reconstruction_error, error_threshold, tokens_total, tokens_unknown, model_name, model_version, inference_latency_ms, template_id, template_text, cluster_density_5m hints, analyst_feedback_label when known, and deployment_env. Training jobs should stamp model_version and training_cohort identifiers compatible with dsdl_model_inventory.csv.

Lane three, Deep Learning Toolkit container metrics: export OpenTelemetry or Prometheus-style metrics into index=otel_metrics with sourcetype=dsdl:container_metrics including container_id, gpu_used, dsdl_inference_latency_ms, memory pressure, and batch sizes. Correlate Kubernetes pod labels to model_name.

Lane four, IT Service Intelligence correlation: mirror high-confidence anomalies into index=itsi_tracked_alerts with source=dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly so episode analytics and service entities see the same template_id and host keys as the summary lane. Enterprise Security consumers may map the same feed into a notable workflow with identical identifiers for analyst ergonomics.

Lane five, offline replay safety net: maintain dsdl_seq2seq_inference_results.csv for lab replays, auditor exports, or disaster recovery when summary indexes pause. Refresh under change control.

Lookup dsdl_model_inventory.csv must include model_name, model_version, training_cohort, owner, accepted_error_threshold. Lookup log_template_inventory.csv must include template_id, expected_daily_volume, business_criticality, template_family, and optional notes for seasonal jobs.

props.conf should TRUNCATE generously for wide JSON, honor TIMESTAMP_FIELDS from provider clocks, and FIELDALIAS alternate names for reconstruction_error when data science pipelines rename columns between releases.

Pre-save validation: confirm each lane returns rows in the trailing window during business hours, that a synthetic high reconstruction_error batch raises cluster_density_5m, and that inventory joins resolve owner without null spikes masquerading as unowned models.

### Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly with a fifteen-minute schedule during steady production, dispatch earliest=-4h@h, dispatch latest=now, and alert when severity is page, high, or medium after deduplication. Throttle duplicate host, template_id, model_name tuples for thirty minutes unless severity escalates. Include recommended_action, lane, and tokens_oov_pct in pager bodies so responders open Deep Learning Toolkit runbooks, container dashboards, and template catalogs without guesswork.

Model training narrative for operators: collect a clean corpus per sourcetype without known incidents, tokenize lines into a fixed vocabulary with explicit unknown handling, train a sequence-to-sequence autoencoder inside the Deep Learning Toolkit container using a Fit workflow equivalent to fit MLTKContainer for deep models, validate reconstruction distributions on holdout weeks, publish champion weights, then schedule apply searches that call the containerized scorer. After each apply, summarize scores into index=summary. Mark analyst-reviewed false positives into analyst_feedback_label so the next fit excludes or down-weights those templates.

Pipeline narrative: multisearch merges app reference context omission from final filters while still available for optional append jobs, summary inference, container metrics, ITSI notables, and lookup replay so one silent lane cannot hide a genuine burst. streamstats and eventstats derive per-template blended thresholds and percentile baselines without hard-coding constants in three different runbooks. coalesce ladders absorb field renames across MLSPL versions. join brings template criticality and model ownership. tstats enriches Performance host CPU and memory for capacity-induced reconstruction quality issues. case maps density, drift_ratio, out-of-vocabulary pressure, latency, and human labels into severity tiers.

Fenced SPL must match the spl JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-13.4.13 DSDL Seq2Seq log reconstruction-error anomaly operations: multisearch fuses app reference logs, materialized dsdl_seq2seq_inference summaries, DSDL container metrics, ITSI tracked-alert correlation rows, and lookup-backed offline inference. Tunables earliest=-4h@h density_page=4 err_ratio_warn=1.0 oov_warn=0.35")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=app sourcetype=app:json earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="app_json_reference"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, dest, hostname, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, "app:json"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, drain_template_id, "template_unparsed"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, message, msg, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=0.0
      | eval error_threshold=0.0
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(token_count, len(_raw), 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=0
      | eval model_name="app_reference_lane"
      | eval model_version="unset"
      | eval inference_latency_ms=0.0
      | eval container_id="none"
      | eval gpu_used=0.0
      | eval analyst_feedback_label="unscored"
      | eval cluster_density_5m=0
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(env, environment, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=summary source="dsdl_seq2seq_inference" earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="summary_seq2seq_inference"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, src_host, log_host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, log_sourcetype, "inference:seq2seq"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, "template_missing"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, template_string, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, recon_mse, mse_loss, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, threshold_mse, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, seq_len, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, unk_tokens, oov_count, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, dsdl_model, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, model_rev, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, batch_latency_ms, mlspl_exec_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, k8s_pod, "unknown_container")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, gpu_util_pct, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, human_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, host_burst_count_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=dsdl:container_metrics earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="dsdl_container_metrics"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(k8s_node, host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype="dsdl:container_metrics"
      | eval template_id="container_lane"
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(metric_name, __name__, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=0.0
      | eval error_threshold=0.0
      | eval tokens_total=0
      | eval tokens_unknown=0
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, dsdl_model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, image_tag, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(dsdl_inference_latency_ms, inference_latency_ms, value, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, pod_uid, docker_id, "unknown_container")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, gpu_used_pct, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label="unscored"
      | eval cluster_density_5m=0
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=itsi_tracked_alerts source="dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly" earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="itsi_notable_correlation"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, entity_key, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype="itsi:tracked_alert"
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, itsi_template_id, "template_from_notable"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(description, itsi_description, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, anomaly_score, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, threshold_mse, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, "none")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ | inputlookup dsdl_seq2seq_inference_results.csv
      | eval lane="lookup_offline_inference"
      | eval _time=coalesce(_time, now())
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, "lookup:seq2seq"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, "template_missing"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, "lookup")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
| eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, "unknown_host"))))
| eval template_id=coalesce(template_id, "template_missing")
| eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
| eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, 0))
| eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, 0))
| eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
| eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
| eval tokens_oov_pct=if(tokens_total>0.0001, round(tokens_unknown/tokens_total, 4), 0)
| sort host template_id + _time
| streamstats window=12 global=f current=t first(error_threshold) AS thr_first last(error_threshold) AS thr_last by template_id
| eval template_thr_blend=round((thr_first+thr_last)/2,6)
| eventstats perc90(reconstruction_error) AS template_err_p90 by template_id
| eventstats stdev(reconstruction_error) AS template_err_stdev by template_id
| where match(lane,"summary_seq2seq_inference|lookup_offline_inference|itsi_notable_correlation") OR match(lane,"dsdl_container_metrics")
| eval is_high_err=if(reconstruction_error>coalesce(error_threshold,template_thr_blend,template_err_p90,0.000001),1,0)
| sort host + _time
| streamstats time_window=300s sum(is_high_err) AS cluster_density_5m_calc by host
| eval cluster_density_5m=coalesce(cluster_density_5m, cluster_density_5m_calc, 0)
| join type=left max=0 template_id
    [| inputlookup log_template_inventory.csv
     | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(template_id)))
     | fields template_id expected_daily_volume business_criticality template_family ]
| join type=left max=0 model_name
    [| inputlookup dsdl_model_inventory.csv
     | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(model_name)))
     | rename model_version AS inventory_model_version
     | fields model_name inventory_model_version training_cohort owner accepted_error_threshold ]
| eval error_threshold=coalesce(error_threshold, accepted_error_threshold, template_thr_blend, template_err_p90, 0)
| eval model_version=coalesce(model_version, inventory_model_version, "0.0.0")
| join type=left max=0 host
    [| tstats summariesonly=true avg(Performance.cpu_pct) AS perf_host_cpu_pct latest(Performance.mem_used) AS perf_host_mem_kb FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
     | eval host=lower(trim(toString(Performance.host)))
     | fields host perf_host_cpu_pct perf_host_mem_kb ]
| eval drift_ratio=if(template_err_p90>0.000001, round(reconstruction_error/template_err_p90,4), 0)
| eval severity=case(
    match(analyst_feedback_label,"false_positive|benign"), "info",
    is_high_err==1 AND cluster_density_5m>=4 AND drift_ratio<3.5, "page",
    is_high_err==1 AND cluster_density_5m>=2, "high",
    is_high_err==1 AND tokens_oov_pct>=0.35, "medium",
    is_high_err==1, "low",
    inference_latency_ms>=8000 AND match(lane,"dsdl_container_metrics"), "medium",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    severity=="page", "investigate_host_burst_correlate_app_change_auth_and_network_then_retrain_seq2seq_with_marked_false_positives",
    severity=="high" AND tokens_oov_pct>=0.35, "refresh_tokenizer_vocab_or_raise_oov_threshold_schedule_dsdl_retrain",
    severity=="high", "tighten_per_sourcetype_threshold_review_drain_templates_and_compare_prod_vs_staging_error_curves",
    severity=="medium" AND inference_latency_ms>=8000, "scale_dsdl_container_increase_gpu_or_batch_tuning_review_mlspl_container_timeouts",
    severity=="medium", "open_model_drift_tuning_ticket_confuse_slow_baseline_shift_with_abrupt_attack_spike",
    true(), "continue_sampling_seq2seq_errors_and_template_coverage")
| eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")
| table time host sourcetype lane template_id model_name reconstruction_error error_threshold cluster_density_5m inference_latency_ms tokens_oov_pct severity recommended_action perf_host_cpu_pct perf_host_mem_kb
```

savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -4h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
action.email = 1
action.email.to = platform-ml-anomaly@example.com
action.email.subject = Seq2Seq recon anomaly $result.severity$ host=$result.host$ template=$result.template_id$
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch platform_uc_13_4_13_dsdl_seq2seq_log_recon_anomaly | where severity IN ("page","high","medium")
```

Performance: if Job Inspector shows multisearch queue time above objectives, materialize per-lane summaries hourly into dedicated summary indexes keyed on host, template_id, and model_name, widen alert windows on summaries, and retain this full search for investigations.

### Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth begins in application and platform logs: pick a host with a known deployment, compare raw messages to template_text fields, and verify reconstruction_error ordering matches offline notebook rankings for the same batch. When Splunk lags, verify summary index permissions, container health, and Heavy Forwarder or HTTP Event Collector token quotas before muting detections.

Deep dive burst logic: inject several high-error lines within five minutes in lab, confirm cluster_density_5m crosses the page threshold, then spread the same lines across hours and confirm severity downgrades toward low or info.

Drift versus attack: simulate a gradual vocabulary drift by enabling a feature flag that adds a common prefix to messages; expect slow template_err_p90 climb. Simulate an abrupt spike by replaying adversarial random-token lines; expect high drift_ratio with rapid cluster formation.

Coverage validation: list sourcetypes in index=app last twenty-four hours, anti-join against summary lane sourcetypes, and confirm the delta is documented as intentional or a blind spot.

Latency validation: stress the Deep Learning Toolkit container with maximum batch size, confirm inference_latency_ms and gpu_used move in otel_metrics, and verify severity medium paths trigger when latency alone threatens SLA.

Negative test: after recovery when analyst_feedback_label marks benign for a template family, severities should fall to info for that family unless new uncategorized lines appear.

Runbook linkage: document quarterly retrain windows and holiday traffic expectations so validators do not file defects during approved population shifts.

### Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — Singleton high reconstruction_error on a quiet host: treat as noise unless business_criticality is maximal; ask for a second opinion from the owning squad before paging nights.

Case 2 — Burst of high-error lines on one host inside five minutes: open incident, correlate authentication and change records, capture container logs, and consider network isolation if pattern matches historical breach playbooks.

Case 3 — Gradual error baseline climb across many hosts: classify as model drift, schedule tokenizer refresh and retrain, compare production versus staging distributions before blaming applications.

Case 4 — Abrupt spike limited to one template_family: inspect release tags, feature flags, and canary deployments; roll back if error budgets burn.

Case 5 — High tokens_oov_pct with moderate errors: prioritize vocabulary expansion, review rare token policy, and delay punitive thresholds until retrain finishes.

Case 6 — Inference latency exceeds budget while GPU headroom exists: increase batch concurrency cautiously, verify MLSPL container timeouts on search heads, and scale pod replicas.

Case 7 — Inference latency high with GPU saturation: add workers, split models by sourcetype, or move scoring to dedicated GPU nodes away from interactive search load.

Case 8 — Summary index silence but app logs flow: repair summary writers, replay dsdl_seq2seq_inference_results.csv, and treat prior calm as untrusted until restored.

Case 9 — ITSI episodes missing despite strong errors: validate source=dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly field aliases, entity lookup keys, and correlation search schedules.

Case 10 — Enterprise Security notables duplicate ITSI rows: dedupe on host and template_id using correlation rules and retain one authoritative narrative for auditors.

Case 11 — Template inventory stale after acquisition: refresh log_template_inventory.csv, reclassify business_criticality, and re-evaluate accepted_error_threshold per model_name.

Case 12 — Analyst-marked false positives cluster on one release: ingest labels into the next training cohort, document confusion-matrix style outcomes, and publish precision recall deltas to leadership.

Closing checklist: five em-dash step headers are present; Step 3 fenced SPL matches the spl field exactly; multisearch lists app JSON, summary inference, container metrics, ITSI notables, and lookup arms; coalesce, streamstats, eventstats, case, join, and inputlookup appear; closing table includes time, host, sourcetype, lane, template_id, model_name, reconstruction_error, error_threshold, cluster_density_5m, inference_latency_ms, tokens_oov_pct, severity, recommended_action, perf_host_cpu_pct, and perf_host_mem_kb for analyst-ready review.

## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-13.4.13 DSDL Seq2Seq log reconstruction-error anomaly operations: multisearch fuses app reference logs, materialized dsdl_seq2seq_inference summaries, DSDL container metrics, ITSI tracked-alert correlation rows, and lookup-backed offline inference. Tunables earliest=-4h@h density_page=4 err_ratio_warn=1.0 oov_warn=0.35")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=app sourcetype=app:json earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="app_json_reference"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, dest, hostname, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, "app:json"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, drain_template_id, "template_unparsed"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, message, msg, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=0.0
      | eval error_threshold=0.0
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(token_count, len(_raw), 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=0
      | eval model_name="app_reference_lane"
      | eval model_version="unset"
      | eval inference_latency_ms=0.0
      | eval container_id="none"
      | eval gpu_used=0.0
      | eval analyst_feedback_label="unscored"
      | eval cluster_density_5m=0
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(env, environment, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=summary source="dsdl_seq2seq_inference" earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="summary_seq2seq_inference"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, src_host, log_host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, log_sourcetype, "inference:seq2seq"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, "template_missing"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, template_string, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, recon_mse, mse_loss, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, threshold_mse, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, seq_len, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, unk_tokens, oov_count, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, dsdl_model, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, model_rev, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, batch_latency_ms, mlspl_exec_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, k8s_pod, "unknown_container")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, gpu_util_pct, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, human_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, host_burst_count_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=dsdl:container_metrics earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="dsdl_container_metrics"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(k8s_node, host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype="dsdl:container_metrics"
      | eval template_id="container_lane"
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(metric_name, __name__, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=0.0
      | eval error_threshold=0.0
      | eval tokens_total=0
      | eval tokens_unknown=0
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, dsdl_model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, image_tag, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(dsdl_inference_latency_ms, inference_latency_ms, value, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, pod_uid, docker_id, "unknown_container")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, gpu_used_pct, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label="unscored"
      | eval cluster_density_5m=0
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ search index=itsi_tracked_alerts source="dsdl_seq2seq_anomaly" earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="itsi_notable_correlation"
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, entity_key, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype="itsi:tracked_alert"
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, itsi_template_id, "template_from_notable"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(description, itsi_description, _raw, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, anomaly_score, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, threshold_mse, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, "none")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
    [ | inputlookup dsdl_seq2seq_inference_results.csv
      | eval lane="lookup_offline_inference"
      | eval _time=coalesce(_time, now())
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, "unknown_host"))))
      | eval sourcetype=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(sourcetype, "lookup:seq2seq"))))
      | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(template_id, "template_missing"))))
      | eval template_text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(template_text, ""))),1,320)
      | eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, 0))
      | eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, 0))
      | eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
      | eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
      | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
      | eval model_version=trim(toString(coalesce(model_version, "0.0.0")))
      | eval inference_latency_ms=tonumber(coalesce(inference_latency_ms, 0))
      | eval container_id=trim(toString(coalesce(container_id, "lookup")))
      | eval gpu_used=tonumber(coalesce(gpu_used, 0))
      | eval analyst_feedback_label=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(analyst_feedback_label, "pending"))))
      | eval cluster_density_5m=tonumber(coalesce(cluster_density_5m, 0))
      | eval deployment_env=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(deployment_env, "prod"))))
      | fields _time host sourcetype lane template_id template_text reconstruction_error error_threshold tokens_total tokens_unknown model_name model_version inference_latency_ms container_id gpu_used analyst_feedback_label cluster_density_5m deployment_env ]
| eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host, "unknown_host"))))
| eval template_id=coalesce(template_id, "template_missing")
| eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(model_name, "unknown_model"))))
| eval reconstruction_error=tonumber(coalesce(reconstruction_error, 0))
| eval error_threshold=tonumber(coalesce(error_threshold, 0))
| eval tokens_total=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_total, 0))
| eval tokens_unknown=tonumber(coalesce(tokens_unknown, 0))
| eval tokens_oov_pct=if(tokens_total>0.0001, round(tokens_unknown/tokens_total, 4), 0)
| sort host template_id + _time
| streamstats window=12 global=f current=t first(error_threshold) AS thr_first last(error_threshold) AS thr_last by template_id
| eval template_thr_blend=round((thr_first+thr_last)/2,6)
| eventstats perc90(reconstruction_error) AS template_err_p90 by template_id
| eventstats stdev(reconstruction_error) AS template_err_stdev by template_id
| where match(lane,"summary_seq2seq_inference|lookup_offline_inference|itsi_notable_correlation") OR match(lane,"dsdl_container_metrics")
| eval is_high_err=if(reconstruction_error>coalesce(error_threshold,template_thr_blend,template_err_p90,0.000001),1,0)
| sort host + _time
| streamstats time_window=300s sum(is_high_err) AS cluster_density_5m_calc by host
| eval cluster_density_5m=coalesce(cluster_density_5m, cluster_density_5m_calc, 0)
| join type=left max=0 template_id
    [| inputlookup log_template_inventory.csv
     | eval template_id=lower(trim(toString(template_id)))
     | fields template_id expected_daily_volume business_criticality template_family ]
| join type=left max=0 model_name
    [| inputlookup dsdl_model_inventory.csv
     | eval model_name=lower(trim(toString(model_name)))
     | rename model_version AS inventory_model_version
     | fields model_name inventory_model_version training_cohort owner accepted_error_threshold ]
| eval error_threshold=coalesce(error_threshold, accepted_error_threshold, template_thr_blend, template_err_p90, 0)
| eval model_version=coalesce(model_version, inventory_model_version, "0.0.0")
| join type=left max=0 host
    [| tstats summariesonly=true avg(Performance.cpu_pct) AS perf_host_cpu_pct latest(Performance.mem_used) AS perf_host_mem_kb FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
     | eval host=lower(trim(toString(Performance.host)))
     | fields host perf_host_cpu_pct perf_host_mem_kb ]
| eval drift_ratio=if(template_err_p90>0.000001, round(reconstruction_error/template_err_p90,4), 0)
| eval severity=case(
    match(analyst_feedback_label,"false_positive|benign"), "info",
    is_high_err==1 AND cluster_density_5m>=4 AND drift_ratio<3.5, "page",
    is_high_err==1 AND cluster_density_5m>=2, "high",
    is_high_err==1 AND tokens_oov_pct>=0.35, "medium",
    is_high_err==1, "low",
    inference_latency_ms>=8000 AND match(lane,"dsdl_container_metrics"), "medium",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    severity=="page", "investigate_host_burst_correlate_app_change_auth_and_network_then_retrain_seq2seq_with_marked_false_positives",
    severity=="high" AND tokens_oov_pct>=0.35, "refresh_tokenizer_vocab_or_raise_oov_threshold_schedule_dsdl_retrain",
    severity=="high", "tighten_per_sourcetype_threshold_review_drain_templates_and_compare_prod_vs_staging_error_curves",
    severity=="medium" AND inference_latency_ms>=8000, "scale_dsdl_container_increase_gpu_or_batch_tuning_review_mlspl_container_timeouts",
    severity=="medium", "open_model_drift_tuning_ticket_confuse_slow_baseline_shift_with_abrupt_attack_spike",
    true(), "continue_sampling_seq2seq_errors_and_template_coverage")
| eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")
| table time host sourcetype lane template_id model_name reconstruction_error error_threshold cluster_density_5m inference_latency_ms tokens_oov_pct severity recommended_action perf_host_cpu_pct perf_host_mem_kb
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats summariesonly=true avg(Performance.cpu_pct) AS perf_cpu latest(Performance.mem_used) AS perf_mem_kb count FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
| rename Performance.host AS host
| eval host=lower(trim(toString(host)))
| where perf_cpu>0 OR perf_mem_kb>0
| table host perf_cpu perf_mem_kb
```

## Visualization

Severity-colored table by host, template_id, and model_name with drilldowns to raw summary inference JSON, container metric series, template inventory rows, model ownership, Performance enrichment, and ITSI notable narratives; dual-axis chart of reconstruction_error versus tokens_oov_pct; timeline of cluster_density_5m; single-value tiles for blind sourcetype coverage and median inference_latency_ms.

## Known False Positives

Legitimate new application releases that introduce genuinely fresh log strings routinely spike reconstruction_error until the champion model retrains on the expanded corpus. Scheduled batch jobs that execute once per quarter produce rare templates that look anomalous despite being healthy business logic. Planned log-format migrations and field renames shift token distributions without security impact. Very low-volume hosts inflate variance on rolling percentile thresholds and create singleton alerts that density logic intentionally suppresses. Intentional debug logging during incident triage floods out-of-vocabulary tokens and raises benign surprise scores. Holiday or promotional traffic patterns absent from training windows mimic drift until seasonal cohorts are labeled. Freshly promoted models still warming up after retrain emit elevated errors for hours until calibration completes. Manual template miner regressions can mis-assign template_id and concentrate false positives in one family until parsers heal. Staging versus production A/B tests that intentionally diverge formats should carry change metadata so validators downgrade severity. Container restarts during node drains can create latency spikes unrelated to model quality. Analyst mis-clicks on feedback labels can temporarily bias thresholds until confusion-matrix audits correct the training export.
